createlazytick.error.file_write_failed: Failed to write the file. Please check the server logs.
createlazytick.error.filter_empty_hint: No filter was provided. Format example: {name:mechanical_saw,value>50}. If there are spaces inside the braces, wrap the whole filter in an extra pair of double quotes.
createlazytick.error.filter_invalid_hint: Please enter a valid filter (Example: {name:saw,value>50}. If there are spaces inside the braces, wrap the whole filter in an extra pair of double quotes.)
createlazytick.error.internal_error_cont: An internal error occurred. Please contact an administrator and ask them to check the server logs.
createlazytick.error.mode_param_only_for: Invalid mode parameter: [%s] (Only forced or dynamic is allowed.)
createlazytick.error.sort_internal_error: An internal error occurred while sorting. Please contact an administrator and ask them to check the console.
createlazytick.error.time_filter_operato: Time filtering only supports [olderthan] (earlier than) or [newerthan] (later than).
createlazytick.error.unexpected_chars: Unexpected characters found: %s (If this is an opening bracket, etc., please check whether it is fully closed.)
createlazytick.error.unparsed_conditions: Could not parse part of the conditions: [%s] (Please check the format.)
createlazytick.export.no_data: There is no data available to export.
createlazytick.export.no_records_cancell: No records match the current filter. Export cancelled.
createlazytick.export.sort_fallback: An error occurred while sorting. The data will be exported using the default order.

createlazytick.message.no_non_default_ma: There are no machines with non-default settings in the current list.
createlazytick.mode.description.auto_def: Description: Default config. Machine sleeps as much as possible without affecting functionality.
createlazytick.mode.description.auto_dyn: Description: Calculate sleep duration dynamically based on load, but not exceeding set limit.
createlazytick.mode.description.forced_f: Description: Lazy tick optimization disabled, machine runs at full speed.
createlazytick.mode.description.forced_s: Description: Ignore machine load, run at fixed frequency.
createlazytick.mode.description.unknown_: Description: If you see this, there might be a bug.

item.createlazytick.clock.tooltip.line2: You can also aim at the lower half of a component and hold to perform fine adjustments
